expectations.evidence: Output shows: 'Executed the status check: python3 ~/scripts/ecosystem_status.py'

expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Reports on 5 systems: Tax PDF Organizer, Media Organizer, Monarch Money MCP Server, Treehouse Context Sync, Notion Rules (Tax OCR)

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: Each system has status: Watching, Installed, Connected, Synced, Idle with status legend explaining each
Attention Items section: 'PDF files in Downloads waiting to be organized'

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: Organized as 'Results Dashboard' with bullet points per system and a Status Legend table

claims.claim: All systems are running or in expected idle states
claims.evidence: Each system shows a healthy status indicator
